statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(basename "$(pwd)"); printf '\033[0;36m%s\033[0m' "$dir"; if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then printf ' \033[1;34mgit:(\033[0;31m%s\033[1;34m)' "$branch"; if ! git --no-optional-locks diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || ! git --no-optional-locks diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then printf '\033[1;34m) \033[0;33m✗\033[0m'; else printf '\033[1;34m)\033[0m'; fi; fi; fi; model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // empty'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); [ -n "$model" ] && printf ' \033[0;35m%s\033[0m' "$model"; [ -n "$used" ] && printf ' \033[0;33mctx:%s%%\033[0m' "$(printf '%.0f' "$used")"
